titleStmt.title: SII 6.1002: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 1002. (A.R. No. 329 of 1899). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śākābdē ratnadṛkdvikṣitiyuji ·ṛṣabha
svacchapakṣatritīyāsaṁyuktē kāvyavārē hariśikhari
patēḥ śrīnṛsiṁhasya viṣṇōḥ . prādāt svābhīṣṭasiddhyai
parimaḷavilasatpuṣpamāḷā nibaṁddhadvaṁdvaṁ cchāḷu
kyavaṁśakṣitipatitilakō viśvanāthakṣitīśaḥ . śakava¨rṣaṁbhu
lu 1229 gunēṁṭi śrīmadanaṁtava¨rmma pratāpavīra śrībhāṇu
dēvasya prava¨rddhamāna vijayarājyasaṁvat saraṁbulu
3 gu śrāhi ·ṛṣabha śukla tritīyā śukravāramunāṁ
ḍu sa¨rvvalōkāśraya śrīviṣṇuva¨rddhana viśvanāthagaṇa sa
masta praśastisahitulaina viSpace for one or twovi may be due to flaw in the stone.śvanāthajīyana tamaku [A]
bhīṣṭa¨rtthasiddhigānu nūku[A]ppunacēta vilicikoni tōṁṭa ni
baṁddhalu reṁḍu śrīnarasiṁhanāthuniki tirumāla peṭṭu
ṭaku bāvanārāyaṇuniki peṭṭiri . Ī dha¨rmmuvu
śrīvaiṣṇavula rakṣa . vīru kaṭiṁcchina dhāramaṁḍapamu [E]ttiṁ
ppanu śrīnarasiṁhanāthuni bhaṁḍāramuna krayamugonna pedagāṁḍi
khaṁḍika cavukapolamu puṭṭaṁḍunnu sittanamōkhari koḍku narasiṁhuniki
Īstimi Ī polamu bhōgyamu sēsi I dhāramaṁḍapamu pratisaṁvatsaramuna
cēĪṁppaṁggalāṁḍu Īṁdula bhaggātuṭṭā Ītaṁḍu parihariṁppaṁgalā
ṁḍu I dha¨rmmuvu Ācaṁdrā¨rkkasthāĪgā cellaṁggaladu I dha¨rmmuvu śrīvaiṣṇa
vula rakṣa śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 6.1002 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
